about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm Luis, a web developer passionate about technology and building useful, effective solutions. I specialize in **frontend development**, using modern tools such as **React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Next.js, and Astro** to build attractive, accessible, high-performance interfaces. I also have intermediate knowledge of backend tools like **NestJS, PostgreSQL, and FastAPI**.
about.p2: I'm currently finishing my Software Design and Development degree at CERTUS institute.
about.p3: I have an **intermediate level of English** and stand out as a responsible, punctual person with strong teamwork skills. Collaboration, clear communication, and commitment to quality are principles I apply in every project I take part in.

cta.text: If you're looking for a committed developer with a strong sense of responsibility and teamwork, feel free to reach out. I'm ready to bring my passion and skills to your next project.
